hint: accent on ó when it's a question word

front: I want to know where they live.
I don't live here, but he does.
back: No vivo aquí, pero él vive aquí.
hint: repeat the verb · *él* carries the contrast

front: I want to know why he doesn't understand.
back: Quiero saber por qué no entiende.

hint: just two letters · doubly weird verb
stressed e splits to ie · cousin of *bueno*
*a* = to · question mark on both sides

front: I don't eat meat and I don't drink alcohol.
back: No como carne y no tomo alcohol.

front: I eat meat and I drink alcohol.
I want to know your opinion.
I don't have to go tonight.
back: No tengo que ir esta noche.

front: Why aren't you seeing them soon?
Are you going to see him soon?
Are you going to see us soon?
hint: or *¿Nos vas a ver pronto?* — both correct

back: Nos vemos la semana que viene.

front: I prefer to see her later.
